description_long: This is a round pizza with a golden-brown crust, topped generously with slices of pepperoni and a layer of melted cheese. The pizza is presented on a decorative plate or tray with a yellow border, featuring the text 'La Mamma' and 'PEPPERONI' in bold red letters, along with wheat motifs. At the center of the pizza, there is a printed or illustrated image of a smiling woman making a peace sign, which appears to be part of the plate or possibly printed on edible paper. The pizza is cut into multiple slices, with the toppings distributed evenly across the surface. The crust is thin and crisp, with a slight rise at the edge. No packaging is visible, and the pizza is ready to be served as is.
description: A thin-crust pepperoni pizza on a decorative yellow plate with 'La Mamma' branding and a central illustration of a woman making a peace sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pizza, the 'La Mamma' text, and the central illustration clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thinness of the crust and the raised edge of the plate.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the 'PEPPERONI' text and the central illustration most visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the other side, again showing the thin crust and plate edge.
